description_long: This rifle features a weathered, industrial appearance with a predominantly yellow cylindrical receiver and a metallic, skeletonized stock. The body shows signs of wear and rust, suggesting heavy use or exposure to harsh urban environments. The barrel is long and slender, extending from the main body, with a dark muzzle at the end. The stock is a simple, angular metal frame, likely designed for lightweight support and easy maneuverability. There is a visible trigger guard and a boxy magazine well beneath the receiver, though the magazine itself is not clearly visible. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical components and a rugged finish suitable for urban scenarios.
description: A rugged, yellow-metal rifle with a skeletonized stock and a long, dark barrel, showing signs of wear and urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle and cylindrical receiver, with the skeletonized stock barely visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the yellow receiver, exposed mechanical parts, and the full length of the skeletonized stock.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and the back of the receiver, with the barrel extending away.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing similar features to view 1, with more detail on the stock's attachment and receiver wear.
